Know more about latest jobs

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Apna app free for job seekers?

Yes, absolutely! Apna app is completely free for all job seekers. You can search, apply, and save jobs without any charges.

How can I apply for jobs using Apna app?

Follow these steps to apply for a job using Apna app.

  1. Download the Apna app from Google Play Store
  2. Log in using your phone number, complete your profile, and select city.
  3. Select the job categories that match your skills
  4. Find the job of your choice and apply
  5. Call HR to schedule an interview

What kind of job vacancies are available currently?

You can find a wide range of vacancies, including Field Recruiter, Gastroenterologist, TIG/MIG Welder - (For UK & Ireland), General Manager Accounts And Finance, NC Programming And Manufacturing Engineer, so on. Whether you're a fresher or an experienced professional, Apna features best job opportunities in various sectors.

What is the average job salary I can expect?

Salaries can vary greatly depending on the industry, experience level, and specific role. The average salary of some companies ranges from ₹192000 to ₹216000 monthly and you can find detailed salary information by referring to the dedicated job salary section.

Which is a good place to find jobs?

Apna is a leading platform for finding your dream jobs in India, it connects thousands of job seekers with top companies and offers a diverse selection of job opportunities across various industries.

What are the top companies offering job opportunity?

Some of the top companies currently hiring for new job vacancy include: 2Coms Consulting Pvt Ltd., Zed Consultancy Service, USI GLOBAL RECRUIT, Executive Car Rental Services, Hireplusplus Technologies Private Limited.

What is the work experience required to apply for jobs?

The minimum experience needed to apply for jobs varies widely depending on the company, industry, and specific role. While some active positions may prefer 1 year work experience and you can easily find jobs that match your experience level by using the search and filter options on the platform.

How can I stay updated with new job openings?

You can create a free job alert on the Apna app, this way you’ll receive instant updates on the latest vacancies directly in your inbox.
